mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_id AS orderId, wo.product_id AS productId, p.product_name AS productName, wo.line_id AS lineId, wo.order_qty AS orderQty, wo.due_date AS dueDate FROM work_order wo LEFT JOIN product p ON p.product_id = wo.product_id WHERE wo.status = 'WAITING' AND wo.shortage_status IN ('NONE','CHECKED') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM material_outbound mo WHERE mo.work_order_id = wo.order_id AND mo.status IN ('DRAFT','ISSUED') ) AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN material_outbound mo ON mo.work_order_id = wom.work_order_id AND mo.status = 'ISSUED' LEFT JOIN material_outbound_item oi ON oi.outbound_id = mo.outbound_id AND oi.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = wo.order_id GROUP BY wom.material_id HAVING COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity),0) < SUM(wom.required_qty) ) ORDER BY wo.due_date ASC, wo.order_id ASC
SELECT wo.order_id AS workOrderId, wo.product_id, wo.line_id, wo.due_date FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.order_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT wom.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty, IFNULL(SUM(mi.quantity),0) AS stockQty FROM work_order_material wom JOIN material m ON m.material_id = wom.material_id LEFT JOIN material_inventory mi ON mi.material_id = wom.material_id AND (mi.is_discarded = 0 OR mi.is_discarded IS NULL) WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{_parameter} GROUP BY wom.material_id, m.material_name, wom.required_qty

SELECT inventory_id, lot_no, quantity, expiration_date, warehouse_code FROM material_inventory WHERE material_id = #{_parameter} AND quantity > 0 AND (is_discarded = 0 OR is_discarded IS NULL) ORDER BY expiration_date ASC, received_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_outbound( outbound_id, work_order_id, source_inbound_id, work_order_date, status, handled_by, due_date ) VALUES( #{outbound_id}, #{work_order_id}, #{source_inbound_id}, (SELECT DATE(created_at) FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{work_order_id}), #{status}, #{handled_by}, #{due_date} )
mapper.select: SELECT due_date FROM work_order WHERE order_id = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO material_outbound_item (outbound_item_id, outbound_id, material_id, quantity, lot_no, required_qty, inventory_id) VALUES
(#{row.outbound_item_id}, #{row.outbound_id}, #{row.material_id}, #{row.quantity}, #{row.lot_no,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{row.required_qty},
(SELECT inventory_id FROM material_inventory WHERE lot_no = #{row.lot_no} AND material_id = #{row.material_id} LIMIT 1))
mapper.select: SELECT outbound_id AS outboundId, work_order_id AS workOrderId, outbound_date AS outboundDate, due_date AS dueDate, status, handled_by AS handledBy FROM material_outbound WHERE outbound_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT i.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, i.quantity, i.lot_no AS lotNo, COALESCE(inv.warehouse_code, m.warehouse_code) AS warehouseCode, inv.expiration_date AS expirationDate FROM material_outbound_item i JOIN material m ON m.material_id = i.material_id LEFT JOIN material_inventory inv ON inv.inventory_id = i.inventory_id OR (inv.material_id = i.material_id AND inv.lot_no = i.lot_no) WHERE i.outbound_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY i.material_id
mapper.update: UPDATE material_inventory mi JOIN material_outbound_item oi ON oi.lot_no = mi.lot_no AND oi.material_id = mi.material_id SET mi.quantity = mi.quantity - oi.quantity WHERE oi.outbound_id = #{_parameter} AND mi.quantity >= oi.quantity
mapper.select: SELECT wo.order_id AS workOrderId, wo.product_id AS productId, wo.line_id AS lineId, wo.due_date AS dueDate FROM work_order wo WHERE wo.order_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT m.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, wom.required_qty AS requiredQty, m.warehouse_code AS defaultWarehouseCode
FROM work_order_material wom JOIN material m ON m.material_id = wom.material_id
WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{_parameter} ORDER BY m.material_id

SELECT CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN wom.material_id = 'RM-0015' THEN 1 WHEN GREATEST(COALESCE(inv.onhand,0) - COALESCE(rs.others,0) + COALESCE(rs.thiswo,0), 0) >= wom.required_qty THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) = COUNT(*) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS ready FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS onhand FROM material_inventory
GROUP BY material_id ) inv ON inv.material_id = wom.material_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(CASE WHEN work_order_id = #{workOrderId} THEN reserved_qty ELSE 0 END) AS thiswo, SUM(CASE WHEN work_order_id <> #{workOrderId} THEN reserved_qty ELSE 0 END) AS others FROM material_reservation GROUP BY material_id ) rs ON rs.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM material_outbound WHERE work_order_id = #{workOrderId}

SELECT CONCAT('OUT-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-', LPAD(COALESCE(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(outbound_id,'-',-1) AS UNSIGNED)),0)+1,3,'0')) FROM material_outbound WHERE outbound_id LIKE CONCAT('OUT-RM-', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d'), '-%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO material_outbound(outbound_id, work_order_id, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES(#{outboundId}, #{workOrderId}, 'DRAFT', NOW(), NOW())

SET @row := 0; INSERT INTO material_outbound_item(outbound_item_id, outbound_id, material_id, quantity, status, created_at, updated_at) SELECT CONCAT(#{outboundId}, '-', LPAD(@row:=@row+1,3,'0')), #{outboundId}, wom.material_id, wom.required_qty, '미출고', NOW(), NOW() FROM work_order_material wom WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId}
mapper.select:
SELECT i.inbound_id AS inboundId, i.order_id AS orderId, i.inbound_date AS inboundDate,
moi.work_order_id AS workOrderId, wo.product_id AS productId, wo.line_id AS lineId, wo.due_date AS dueDate,
/* 총 입고 수량(이 입고건의 해당 품목들) */ SUM(ii.quantity) AS totalInboundQty,
/* 이미 출고된 수량(LOT 기준 합계) */ COALESCE(used.total_used_qty, 0) AS usedQty,
/* 가용 수량 */ SUM(ii.quantity) - COALESCE(used.total_used_qty, 0) AS availableQty
FROM material_inbound i JOIN material_inbound_item ii ON ii.inbound_id = i.inbound_id
JOIN material_order mo ON mo.order_id = i.order_id
LEFT JOIN material_order_item moi ON moi.order_item_id = ii.order_item_id
LEFT JOIN work_order wo ON wo.order_id = moi.work_order_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.lot_no, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_used_qty FROM material_outbound_item oi JOIN material_outbound o ON o.outbound_id = oi.outbound_id WHERE o.status IN ('DRAFT','ISSUED') AND oi.lot_no IS NOT NULL AND oi.lot_no <> '' GROUP BY oi.lot_no ) used ON used.lot_no = ii.lot_no
WHERE i.inbound_status = '입고완료'
GROUP BY i.inbound_id, i.order_id, i.inbound_date, moi.work_order_id, wo.product_id, wo.line_id, wo.due_date, used.total_used_qty
HAVING (SUM(ii.quantity) - COALESCE(used.total_used_qty, 0)) > 0 ORDER BY i.inbound_date DESC

SELECT w.order_id AS workOrderId, w.product_id AS productId, w.line_id AS lineId, w.due_date AS dueDate FROM material_inbound i JOIN material_order o ON o.order_id = i.order_id JOIN work_order w ON w.order_id = o.work_order_id WHERE i.inbound_id = #{_parameter}

SELECT wom.work_order_id FROM material_inbound i JOIN material_order_item moi ON moi.order_id = i.order_id JOIN work_order_material wom ON wom.material_id = moi.material_id JOIN work_order wo ON wo.order_id = wom.work_order_id WHERE i.inbound_id = #{_parameter} AND IFNULL(wo.is_deleted,0) = 0 ORDER BY CASE wo.status WHEN 'IN_PROGRESS' THEN 0 WHEN 'WAITING' THEN 1 ELSE 2 END, wo.due_date ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT wom.material_id, SUM(wom.required_qty) AS req, COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity), 0) AS issued FROM work_order_material wom LEFT JOIN material_outbound mo ON mo.work_order_id = wom.work_order_id AND mo.status = 'ISSUED' -- 출고 완료건만 집계 LEFT JOIN material_outbound_item oi ON oi.outbound_id = mo.outbound_id AND oi.material_id = wom.material_id WHERE wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} GROUP BY wom.material_id HAVING COALESCE(SUM(oi.quantity),0) < SUM(wom.required_qty) -- 아직 모자라면 남음 ) t
mapper.update: UPDATE work_order SET shortage_status = 'RESOLVED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{_parameter}
UPDATE work_order SET status = 'ISSUED_COMPLETED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{_parameter}
mapper.select:
SELECT ii.material_id AS materialId, m.material_name AS materialName, COALESCE(ii.lot_no, '') AS lotNo, /* 가용수량 = 입고수량 - (이미 출고로 묶인 수량) */ (COALESCE(ii.quantity, 0) - COALESCE(used.used_qty, 0)) AS availableQty, ii.expiration_date AS expirationDate, /* 필요수량: 작업지시별 자재 필요 분량 */ COALESCE(wom.required_qty, 0) AS requiredQty FROM material_inbound_item ii JOIN material_inbound i ON i.inbound_id = ii.inbound_id JOIN material m ON m.material_id = ii.material_id /* 출고로 사용된 수량: material_id + lot_no 단위 합산 (LOT는 입고에서 생성되므로 inbound_id 없이도 식별됨) */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT moi.material_id, COALESCE(moi.lot_no, '') AS lot_no, SUM(moi.quantity) AS used_qty -- 필요시 issued_qty로 교체 FROM material_outbound_item moi GROUP BY moi.material_id, COALESCE(moi.lot_no, '') ) used ON used.material_id = ii.material_id AND used.lot_no = COALESCE(ii.lot_no, '') /* 작업지시 필요수량 */ LEFT JOIN work_order_material wom ON wom.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} AND wom.material_id = ii.material_id
WHERE i.inbound_id = #{inboundId} AND i.inbound_status = '입고완료' AND (COALESCE(ii.quantity, 0) - COALESCE(used.used_qty, 0)) > 0
ORDER BY ii.expiration_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE material_inbound i JOIN ( SELECT ii.inbound_id, SUM(ii.quantity) AS total_inbound, COALESCE(SUM(used.used_qty), 0) AS total_used FROM material_inbound_item ii LEFT JOIN ( SELECT oi.lot_no, SUM(oi.quantity) AS used_qty FROM material_outbound_item oi JOIN material_outbound o ON o.outbound_id = oi.outbound_id WHERE o.status IN ('DRAFT','PARTIAL','ISSUED') GROUP BY oi.lot_no ) used ON used.lot_no = ii.lot_no WHERE ii.inbound_id = #{inboundId} GROUP BY ii.inbound_id ) calc ON calc.inbound_id = i.inbound_id SET i.usage_status = CASE WHEN calc.total_used = 0 THEN 'AVAILABLE' WHEN calc.total_used >= calc.total_inbound THEN 'FULLY_USED' ELSE 'PARTIALLY_USED' END WHERE i.inbound_id = #{inboundId}
